0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Quick Start"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Get Mnemosyne running in under 5 minutes. This guide covers installation, basic configuration, and your first memory operations."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Prerequisites"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Python 3.10 or higher"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"pip or uv package manager"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"(Optional) An OpenAI API key for embedding generation"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Install"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"First, activate the Hermes agent virtual environment:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"source ~/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/activate","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Then install the Mnemosyne package:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"pip install mnemosyne-memory","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Or with uv (recommended for speed):"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"uv pip install mnemosyne-memory","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Initialize the Database"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Run the built-in installer to set up the SQLite database and schema:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"python -m mnemosyne.install","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Note:"}]," Mnemosyne uses SQLite with FTS5 for full-text search by default. If ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," is available, vector search is enabled automatically — but it is entirely optional."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Verify Installation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Confirm everything is working:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"hermes mnemosyne stats","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"This should print memory statistics (e.g. total memories, database size). You can also check the version:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"hermes mnemosyne version","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"What's Next?"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Read the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/getting-started/installation","children":"Installation Guide"}]," for detailed setup options"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Learn about ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/getting-started/configuration","children":"Configuration"}]," to customize behavior"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Explore the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/architecture/beam-overview","children":"BEAM Architecture"}]," to understand how memory works"]}],"\n"]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/03grble4o35rv.js","async":true}]],["$","$L3",null,{"children":["$","$4",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@5"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"2dQ5KqP-HsPKzUBBlSLdX"}
